name: Toast Close
description: A moment of raised glasses and shared joy — tight on faces and expressions.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Close on faces mid-toast, glasses raised, joy written in every line.
{setting}. Tight framing of a celebratory moment, expressions bright and unguarded.
{setting}. Close on figures sharing a drink, warmth and laughter filling the frame.

head thrown back, mouth wide open in a full laugh
